name: Jennings Transportation
registry_source: BBB / Manta / company website / press release (Pennsylvania entity; PA DoS file.dos.pa.gov requires direct search not accessible via WebFetch)
notes: Legal name Jennings Transportation Corp; HQ 129 Meyer Rd Nazareth PA 18064 (Bushkill Township); founded 1973 by Oliver & Evelyn Jennings. Private contractor for Nazareth Area School District; fleet of ~66 school buses + 25 school vehicles; ~85 employees; estimated $4.3M revenue. SAFER name searches for 'JENNINGS TRANSPORTATION', 'JENNINGS TRANSPORTATION CORP', and 'JENNINGS' returned only out-of-state carriers (Las Vegas NV USDOT 2237139; McDonough GA USDOT 3328522; Canton PA USDOT 1315568 'Jennings Bus Co' - different company; Orlando FL USDOT 854888; Mt Pleasant SC USDOT 3231588). No USDOT (likely intrastate PA school bus contractor under PA PUC jurisdiction).

name: Middletown Township Bus-Pro
notes: Likely a data-quality artifact. SAFER searches for 'BUS-PRO', 'BUS PRO' returned no matches. The address 220 Highland Ave, Media PA 19063 appears to be a residential single-family home (1950-built, 3BR/1.5BA per Compass/Trulia/Movoto listings), not a commercial bus operator. No business by name 'Middletown Township Bus-Pro' is locatable in PA records or in Middletown Township (Delaware County) websites. Middletown Twp Recreation Department does run day-trip bus programs from its municipal building at 27 N. Pennell Rd Media (Roosevelt Community Center 464 S. Old Middletown Rd), but uses chartered coaches - not an independent operator at 220 Highland Ave. Recommend flagging as non-target / source-data error.

name: All County Bus
registry_source: NY DOS Division of Corporations (DOS ID 2278276); opengovus.com aggregator
notes: Legal name ALL COUNTY BUS, LLC; NY domestic LLC; initial filing 7/13/1998; principal office 70 Fernbrook St Yonkers NY 10705. Founder Don Gregory spun off from a family-owned Yonkers transportation company that had served Westchester since 1963; he was Controller before founding All County Bus in 1998. Operates ~170 vehicles, ~300 employees, ~250 routes from Yonkers to Peekskill; focused on Westchester special-needs student transportation. SAFER name searches for 'ALL COUNTY BUS', 'ALL COUNTY' yielded no Yonkers carrier (only ALL COUNTY CONTRACTING Croton, ALL COUNTY TRANSPORT Spring Valley, ALL COUNTY TOWING Yorktown Heights). No USDOT - operates strictly intrastate within NY (Westchester County), regulated under NY DOT 19-A school bus driver/operator program.

name: B G Transportation
registry_source: Manta business directory (NJ DOR Business Name Search not directly queryable via WebFetch; Manta reports NJ incorporation in 2005)
notes: HQ 237 Boulevard Floor 1, Passaic NJ 07055; categorized as School Bus Transportation Services; established 2005; incorporated in NJ; ~$133K estimated annual revenue; ~3 employees - small operator. SAFER name searches for 'B G TRANSPORTATION', 'BG TRANSPORTATION' did NOT return this carrier (only B G TRANSPORTATION CORPORATION Los Angeles CA USDOT 2488992, M B G TRANSPORTATION Houston TX USDOT 3509554, ROB G TRANSPORTATION LLC Chatsworth GA USDOT 4016479). 'BG TRANSPORT OF NJ INC' USDOT 4007014 / MC-1507597 is a DIFFERENT carrier in Wayne NJ (34 Owens Dr) for general freight - not a match. The Passaic operator has no USDOT (intrastate-only NJ school bus operator regulated by NJ MVC).

name: Superior Bus Svc
registry_source: Michigan LARA MiBusiness Registry (not directly verified - portal requires interactive search)
notes: Listed address 1827 Oak St, Sault Sainte Marie MI 49783. SAFER name searches for 'SUPERIOR BUS', 'SUPERIOR BUS SVC', 'SUPERIOR BUS SERVICE', and 'SUPERIOR' returned no MI-based carriers - only out-of-state matches (Conley Superior Business WV USDOT 1799637; RB Superior Bus FL USDOT 3261306; Superior Bus Lines TX USDOT 4457511; Superior Bus Service Inc Plymouth Meeting PA USDOT 961591 - not a match). Michigan MDOT licensed bus carrier database also returned no 'Superior'-branded carrier in Chippewa County/Sault Ste Marie. BBB shows only Fresh Coast Brew Bus near area. Local school transportation is handled by METS (Michigan Educational Transportation Services) for Sault Ste Marie Area Public Schools and AGS-EUP; no independent 'Superior Bus Svc' was located in current records. Likely defunct, very small intrastate operator, or potentially mislabeled source-data entry. No USDOT (likely intrastate or no longer operating).
